title: Trump Signals Escalation of Conflict with Iran

title: Intel Report: Large-Scale War Unlikely to Oust Iran's Regime
summary: An intelligence report suggests that a large-scale war is unlikely to lead to the removal of the current Iranian regime.

title: Israel and Iran Exchange Fire, Threatening Wider Conflict

charlotte_impact: The escalating conflict between Israel and Iran raises concerns about a broader regional war.

title: Trump's Iran War Demands Shift Amid US Military Planning

title: Tariff Refund Deadline Approaching

title: Ford Recalls Millions of Vehicles Due to Camera Issues
